heading: South Santa Clara County recycled water project
label: 390h–30 South Santa Clara County recycled water project

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the South County Regional Wastewater Authority and the Santa Clara Valley Water District, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of recycled water system distribution facilities.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of the project authorized by this section shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost of the project.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation and maintenance of the project authorized by this section.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $7,000,000.
